creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Created attachment 207387
irc/irssi: Update to 1.2.2

This patch updates irc/irssi to 1.2.2. This is a security release which resolves CVE-2019-15717.
An unrelated crash is also fixed.

The security advisory can be found at https://irssi.org/security/html/irssi_sa_2019_08/ and the regular release notes can be found at https://irssi.org/NEWS/#v1-2-2

-David
